quotes: Email body width: **600px** fixed, centered; sections must render edge-to-edge
Mobile breakpoint: **480px**; all multi-column layouts collapse to single column.

rules.intent: Ensure reliable and responsive rendering across popular email clients.
rules.rule_text: The email canvas has a fixed, centered width of 600px (dimension.canvas.width = 600px). Sections must render edge-to-edge. Multi-column layouts must collapse to a single column below the mobile breakpoint of 480px (breakpoint.grid.mobile = 480px).

quotes: Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.
Section top/bottom internal padding: **32px** (each section owns its own top AND bottom padding; no external margins between sections — assembly is zero-gap stacking).
Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.

rules.intent: Establish consistent spatial patterns for flawless section stackability and readability.
rules.rule_text: Maintain a vertical layout rhythm based on an 8px base unit (spacing.grid.base_unit = 8px). All sections have 24px horizontal side padding (padding.section.side = 24px) and 32px vertical internal padding (padding.section.vertical = 32px). Maintain explicit vertical gaps: 16px from headings to body and between paragraphs (margin.flow.heading_to_body = 16px), 24px from body copy to CTA or callouts (margin.flow.body_to_cta = 24px), and 8px from images to captions (margin.flow.image_to_caption = 8px). Each section must own its internal padding without external margin gaps to support zero-gap stacking.

quotes: Buttons/CTA **[GENERAL, contrast-checked to palette]:** Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height** (brand accessibility rule: ≥48px clickable areas), corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill, echoing the rounded brand aesthetic). Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics. One primary CTA per section maximum.

rules.intent: Maintain typographic hierarchy, clear action pathways, and regulatory-grade touch target sizes.
rules.rule_text: Buttons use a pill-shaped corner radius of 24px (radius.cta.standard_button = 24px) and must maintain a minimum touch target height of 48px (dimension.accessibility.touch_target_min = 48px). Primary CTA buttons feature a Brand Blue (#00529b) background with White (#ffffff) text. Secondary CTA buttons feature a White background, 2px Brand Blue border, and Brand Blue text. Use Nunito Sans Bold 16px with 14px 32px padding, limiting each section to a maximum of one primary CTA.
